predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: constitutes_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person's presence on the territory constitutes illegal residence.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person concerned has been performed.

predicates.name: risk_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is current and real.

predicates.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: national_authority_recognised_as_national
predicates.description: The national authority of the alien's country has recognised the alien as a national and declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien is an identified alien.

predicates.name: at_least_one_objective_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria in paragraph 2 is present for the person.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 1 is present: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not make an international protection application within the required time limit.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 2 is present: the person used false information, false documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 3 is present: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 4 is present: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 5 is present: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 6 is present: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative decision or removal measure.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 7 is present: the person concealed having previously provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 8 is present: the person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 9 is present: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 10 is present: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

predicates.name: objective_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2, point 11 is present: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal residence.

predicates.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
predicates.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means
predicates.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear that they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure (domestic or equivalent foreign measure).

predicates.name: already_failed_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure (domestic or equivalent foreign measure).

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating residence, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state
predicates.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application
predicates.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
